---
title: "code_sentinel.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\code_sentinel.py"
loc: 161
complexity: 23
logic_score: 0.72
style_score: 3.77
intel_score: 4.88
overall_score: 2.11
---

## Intent
The `code_sentinel.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on Heimdall, __init__, _load_config, scan_for_orphans, run_ruff, format_results, execute_audit, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via Heimdall, __init__, _load_config, scan_for_orphans, run_ruff, format_results, execute_audit, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 21 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [ast](file://ast)
- [json](file://json)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `Heimdall`
- `__init__`
- `_load_config`
- `scan_for_orphans`
- `run_ruff`
- `format_results`
- `execute_audit`
- `main`
